theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) mixed with brand Orange accents.
theme_and_archetype.rationale: The platform requires authority, clarity, and function-first design to build trust between customers and providers. High contrast (Black/White) provides clarity, while the Orange accent drives action and matches the brand logo (CraftBolt).

typography.anti_default_rule: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans are BANNED. Headings must use Outfit.

layout_and_spacing.scale: Tailwind spacing: p-4, p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24, p-32

grids.bento_advantages: MODE A: Tetris Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, gap-8. Mix spans (col-span-4, col-span-8).
grids.dashboard_control_room: MODE B: Control Room Grid for Provider/Customer dashboards. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
grids.steps_how_it_works: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 with a connecting line (visible on md+).

components_strategy.marketing_pages: Custom HTML + Tailwind for hero, bento grid, and steps. Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards for creative layouts.
components_strategy.dashboard_and_forms: Use highly customized Shadcn components (Input, Select, Form, Dialog, Tabs) for the multi-step registration and dashboard.
components_strategy.pricing: 3 Cards layout. 1px solid border. The 'Zákazník' card (190 Kč), 'Nepodnikatel' (290 Kč), 'OSVČ/firmy' (490 Kč). Highlight the middle/popular tier with an Orange border.
components_strategy.video_section: Large 16:9 aspect ratio container (max-h-[80vh]), rounded-2xl, overflow-hidden, with a play button centered (glassmorphism style).
components_strategy.cards_dashboard: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-black/5. Sticky z-50.
surfaces.modals_and_overlays: High-end glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px border border-black/10.
surfaces.bento_items: Solid subtle background (#F8F9FA), 1px border (#E5E7EB), internal padding p-6 or p-8.

motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and pricing cards.

icons_and_assets.library: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for dashboards.
icons_and_assets.data_testid: ALL interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute (e.g., login-form-submit-button).

hero_background.description: Craftsman with a red/black drill, to be used in the hero section or video section placeholder.

feature_woodworker.description: Carpenter working on wood, suitable for 'How it works' or features grid.

dashboard_map_tracking.description: GPS navigation screen, abstract representation for the real-time tracking feature map.

city_map_route.description: Person holding map on tablet. Use for geolocation feature.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON guidelines for color, typography, and spacing.
Start by implementing the Homepage layout first (Hero, 10 Advantages Bento Grid, 4 Steps How it Works, Video Section, Pricing).
For the Logo, use text 'CraftBolt' with 'Craft' styled in black (#0A0A0A) and 'Bolt' styled in primary orange (#F97316).
Implement multi-step registration (Basic Info -> Role Selection -> Plan Type -> Details -> Category).
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography. DO NOT use generic placeholder icons.
For the dashboards (Customer and Provider), use the Control Room Grid layout, keeping it dense and highly functional. Add tracking map placeholder using 'dashboard_map_tracking' image.
Ensure all buttons and interactive elements have appropriate focus, hover states, and 'data-testid' attributes.
For the 3 pricing tiers: 1. Zákazník (190 Kč), 2. Nepodnikatel (290 Kč), 3. OSVČ/firmy (490 Kč).
